hero.title: Build AI into the product. Not on top of it.
hero.subtitle: AI-Native Engineering
hero.description: We design and ship AI systems that are native to the product — shaping how it works, adapts, and delivers value.

bestFit.label: Best fit
bestFit.description: Founders building products where AI is the core experience — not a feature. Especially teams moving from prototype to production, or replacing brittle integrations with something that actually scales.

caseStudiesDescription: Proof from AI product builds, copilot deployments, and full-stack systems shipped for founders moving fast.

caseStudies.title: KittyKat
caseStudies.description: Built the AI-powered creative production system that enabled a brand studio to launch high-volume campaigns with AI-generated visuals.
outcomes: Reduced creative production time by 80% through AI-powered automation.
Built a repeatable content generation pipeline for high-volume campaigns.
Delivered a production-ready system integrated into the team's existing workflow.
Enabled the team to scale content output without scaling headcount.

proofPoints.title: Automated product-to-model generation
proofPoints.description: Turned product photos into model visuals through a faster AI-led production workflow.

proofPoints.title: Improved realism and quality
proofPoints.description: Used data preprocessing and hierarchical refinement to improve proportion accuracy and premium visual output.

proofPoints.title: Scaled brand visual production
proofPoints.description: Reduced image creation time and made it easier to produce larger volumes of usable campaign assets.

testimonial.quote: The value of the work was not just faster image generation. It was building an AI visual pipeline that improved realism, reduced production delay, and made large-scale branded output far more usable.

caseStudies.title: Bevolve AI
caseStudies.description: Turned fragmented sustainability reporting into an AI-guided system teams could trust for faster, evidence-based decisions.
outcomes: Automated ESG data collection from fragmented sources into a unified dashboard.
Reduced reporting time from weeks to hours with AI-assisted generation.
Made compliance evidence traceable and auditable at report time.
Built an intelligence layer teams trusted for faster sustainability decisions.

proofPoints.title: Connected fragmented data
proofPoints.description: Unified diverse ESG and GHG inputs into one more manageable reporting and compliance flow.

proofPoints.title: Improved decision support
proofPoints.description: Added AI-guided insight generation, benchmarking, and natural-language access to speed up review workflows.

proofPoints.title: Raised trust and usability
proofPoints.description: Made complex sustainability reporting easier to understand while preserving transparency and rigor.

testimonial.quote: The strongest shift was not just automation, but coherence. Reporting, benchmarking, and AI-guided analysis started feeling like one usable system, which made complex ESG work easier to navigate and easier to act on.

caseStudies.title: AgeShift
caseStudies.description: Engineered the AI-driven wellness intelligence layer that personalized aging journeys for a health-first consumer platform.
outcomes: Delivered personalized aging wellness recommendations at scale.
Built an AI layer that adapted journeys based on real behavioral signals.
Reduced manual care coordination overhead through intelligent automation.
Launched a production system handling 10K+ user personalization events daily.

proofPoints.title: Personalization at scale
proofPoints.description: Delivered adaptive wellness recommendations based on real behavioral signals for each user.

proofPoints.title: Intelligent automation
proofPoints.description: Reduced manual care coordination overhead through an AI layer that handled routine decisions automatically.

proofPoints.title: Production-ready system
proofPoints.description: Launched a platform handling 10K+ personalization events daily, built for institutional growth.

testimonial.quote: The AI layer didn't just speed things up. It made the product feel genuinely personalised in a way that users noticed and trusted.

caseStudies.title: tvam
caseStudies.description: Unified product narrative and campaign touchpoints to improve trust, response quality, and acquisition efficiency.
outcomes: Unified product messaging across all digital touchpoints.
Improved lead quality through clearer positioning on landing pages.
Reduced cost-per-acquisition with tighter campaign targeting.
Built a scalable analytics foundation for ongoing optimization.

proofPoints.title: Unified product messaging
proofPoints.description: Aligned all digital touchpoints around a clearer product narrative that improved trust and response quality.

proofPoints.title: Improved acquisition efficiency
proofPoints.description: Tighter campaign targeting reduced cost-per-acquisition while clearer positioning improved lead quality.

proofPoints.title: Scalable analytics foundation
proofPoints.description: Set up tracking and insight loops that turned campaign data into smarter, faster growth decisions.

testimonial.quote: Partnering with Yuvabe Studios for over a year, we've seen exceptional results. Their deep understanding of our vision and customer segments, combined with prompt responsiveness, has strengthened our brand.
testimonial.attribution: Aruna Sampige, tvam Technologies Pvt. Ltd.

approach.label: How we build it
approach.headline: AI that works in production, not just in demos.

principles.title: Product-first, AI-second
principles.description: We start with what the user actually needs to do, then decide where AI creates the most leverage. Not the other way around.

principles.title: Built to be reliable
principles.description: Retrieval, orchestration, validation, fallback. We build the infrastructure that makes AI behaviour predictable at scale.

principles.title: Shipped, not prototyped
principles.description: Every AI workstream is paired with the cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and scaling patterns it needs to stay up in production — not just pass a demo.

services.title: AI product architecture
services.description: Designing the AI layer before writing the first line of code. Model selection, retrieval strategy, orchestration, and the system logic that holds it together.

services.title: RAG and retrieval systems
services.description: Vector search, document ingestion, and retrieval pipelines that give AI the right context at the right moment — without hallucinating the rest.

services.title: LLM integration and orchestration
services.description: GPT, Claude, Gemini, or open-source — integrated into product flows with prompt engineering, output validation, and fallback logic built in.

services.title: Cloud infrastructure and deployment
services.description: CI/CD pipelines, secure cloud deployment, and scalable backend architecture. AI products that stay up, stay fast, and stay auditable.

pageTestimonial.label: Client perspective
pageTestimonial.quote: What mattered most here was orchestration. Multiple AI tools, retrieval workflows, and cloud systems were brought into one product experience that felt useful, reliable, and much easier to navigate.
pageTestimonial.name: TVAM engagement

secondaryCtaLabel: See how we'd approach your build
